CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2021 Continued To Nov-24-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Change Of Venue And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-10-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS JEFF MARTIN, TRIBAL PLANET, INC., SUSAN MARTIN and WILL COOPER'S Motion for Change of Venue and Request for Sanctions:

Defendants' unopposed motion to change venue to San Mateo County and for an award of reasonable expenses and attorney's fees incurred in making the motion in the amount of $3,060 is granted.

Prevailing/Moving party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
